title: stelis opercularis
intro: Stelis opercularis, also known as the stelis orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Stelis opercularis is used for its potential health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea infusions or as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
